zh.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch是Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth的兒子，於1275年出生在威爾士。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch是Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth的儿子，于1275年出生在威尔士。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  African/Muslim Amadou, Ousmane, Demba, Mamadou, Daouda, Ibrahima, Mohamed, Thierno, Abdoul, Abdoulaye, Abou, Aissatou, Fatime, Fatou, Mame, Moussa, Oumar, Yassin.  Vietnamese Dung, Thai Van, Tho, Thuy, Toan, Tong Van, Tran.
West African (mainly Senegal and Mauritania): Fulani name, from the Mandinka adjective ba(a) ‘big, great’. Compare Bah 1, see also Balde 1.
Muslim: abstracted as a surname from bā, a dialect form of Arabic Abu ‘father’, used in compound surnames such as Bā Wazīr and Bā Ṭarafi.

variants.name: Balde
meanings: West African (mainly Senegal and Mauritania): Fulani name, regarded as an equivalent (variant) of   Ba   1.
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with bald ‘bold, quick’ (see Bald ).
Catalan (Baldé): possibly from an old personal name of ancient Germanic origin (see 2 above).

variants.name: Bah
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  African/Muslim Mamadou, Thierno, Amadou, Boubacar, Fatmata, Fatoumata, Mariama, Oumou, Umaru, Aboubacar, Aissatou, Alieu, Mohamed, Abdulai, Ibrahima, Abdul, Abdoul, Ibrahim, Abou, Abu, Abubakar, Ali, Hassane, Mahmoud.
West African (mainly Guinea, also common in the Gambia and Sierra Leone): variant of the Fulani name   Ba   1.
Slovenian: probably a nickname from a derivative of bahati se ‘to boast, to pride oneself’. Compare Bach 7.

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Pawel, Zuzanna, Zygmunt.
North German: habitational name from any of various minor places which get their names from an ancient Germanic element goch, gog ‘marsh, bog, fen’.
Polish: from a pet form of various personal names beginning with Go-, such as Gościsław.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch was born in 1275, in Wales as the son of Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch est né en 1275, à Galles, fils de Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch wurde 1275 in Wales, als Sohn von Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch è nato il nel 1275 nel Galles come figlio di Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gochは1275年にウェールズでIorwerth Goch ap Iorwerthの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch(은)는 1275년 웨일스에서 Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch nasceu em 1275, em Gales filho de Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch родился в 1275 г. в местности Уэльс. Его отца звали Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Goch nació en 1275, en Gales como hijo de Iorwerth Goch ap Iorwerth. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
